name: CareTrace
description: AI-powered Clinical Timeline Reconstruction. Transforms fragmented patient clinical documents into coherent longitudinal medical histories with FHIR R4 output. Fully local — zero patient data egress.
author: CareTrace

tools.name: extract_medical_entities
tools.description: Extract structured medical entities (diagnoses, medications, labs, procedures, allergies, encounters) from unstructured clinical text using local AI. Supports SHARP context propagation.

tools.name: build_fhir_bundle
tools.description: Convert extracted clinical entities into a valid FHIR R4 Bundle with Patient, Condition, MedicationStatement, Observation, Encounter, and AllergyIntolerance resources.

tools.name: reconstruct_patient_timeline
tools.description: CORE TOOL: Reconstruct a complete patient clinical timeline from multiple fragmented documents. Returns chronological timeline, FHIR bundle, risk flags, and physician-ready narrative summary.

sharp_context.patient_id: FHIR patient identifier for context propagation
sharp_context.fhir_base_url: FHIR server base URL for live resource posting
